product.hero_eyebrow: You didn't choose them. They chose you.
product.hero_scarcity_1: Created especially for you. There are no two alike.
product.hero_scarcity_2: Exists only once. Once it's gone, it doesn't come back.
product.short_inc_1: One-of-a-kind, unrepeatable piece · channeled only for you
product.short_inc_2: Personal channeled letter · handwritten for this adoption
product.short_inc_4: Lifetime access to My Magic · 7-day channeling, Oracle, Journal, the rituals of the forest
product.gift_toggle: Is it a gift? Personalize the recipient
product.gift_known: It's a gift and I know the recipient's details
product.gift_surprise: It's a surprise, I'll deliver it
product.gift_help: The Forest will send them the ritual at this email when it is ready.
product.inc_1_desc: Hand-sculpted polymer clay with natural crystals. Each piece exists only once in the world.
product.inc_2_desc: Personal handwritten message after the 7-day ritual. It only makes sense to you.
product.inc_3_desc: Lifetime access to the digital portal with guides, rituals, and exclusive content.
product.inc_4_desc: Document that certifies the authenticity and origin of your Guardian from Piriápolis.
product.inc_5_desc: Instructions to seal the energetic bond and begin your path with the Guardian.
product.seal_title: Every Guardian Is Born with a Message
product.seal_p1: This isn't a sculpture. It is a being channeled in deep meditation, in Piriápolis — an energetic point recognized worldwide. After you adopt, a 7-day ritual begins. We connect with your energy and the Guardian's. The result is a handwritten letter — a message that only makes sense to you.
product.seal_p2: It isn't generic. It doesn't repeat. It can't be forced. More than 15,000 people in 45 countries received theirs. Many cried when they read it.
product.seal_s1d: The Guardian tunes into your energy
product.seal_s2d: The message reveals itself. A unique phrase is born for you
product.seal_s3d: The bond is sealed. Ready to depart for its new home
product.seal_final: Each letter is one-of-a-kind. Each message, unrepeatable.
product.recs_title: Other Guardians Waiting for a Home
product.wait_days: · waiting for you for {{ count }} days
product.wait_weeks: · waiting for you for {{ count }} weeks

test.intro_line_1: Some people feel more than logic can explain.
test.intro_line_2: They find feathers, see repeating numbers, sense presences.
test.intro_line_3: They know things without knowing how they know.
test.intro_sub_1: If you made it here, you probably already know you are one of them.
test.intro_sub_2: This is not a generic quiz. We are going to read you.
test.form_sub: We need to know who we are channeling for. Your information stays between us and your guardian.
test.form_phone_hint: We only use it to send your reading by WhatsApp if you want.
test.form_dob_hint: Optional. If you continue into the Encuentro flow, we may use this signal for the channeling.
test.form_consent: Your information is kept private. We only use it to send you your channeling by email and, if you ask, by WhatsApp. We never share it.
test.q_sub: The forest reads you through your own words. Tell us in your own voice what you feel today, what you seek, what bothers you, what paralyzes you, what you need to change. There are no right answers. The more honest you are, the more precise the reading.
test.q_placeholder: Start wherever you want. What weighs on you, what excites you, what pulls you forward, what holds you back. Write as if no one was reading. (At least about 10 sentences — around 200 words —, maximum 3000 characters.)
test.q_error: Write at least 200 characters (~10 sentences) so the channeling can read you well.
test.loading_stage_2: Detecting the signals you carry today.
test.loading_stage_3: Searching for the guardian woven for you.
test.result_compat_title: Others who vibrate close to you
test.result_compat_sub: Not your central guardian, but they understand you.
test.receive_sub: Your guardian, the message, and the compatible ones.
test.receive_email_sent: Done. Check your inbox (may take 1-2 minutes).
test.receive_email_failed: We couldn't send the email. Try again or check your spam folder.
test.share_wa_message: I just took the Guardian Test from Duendes del Uruguay and my guardian is {guardian}. It felt very real. Take yours and find out which one is for you:
test.error_text: We could not complete the channeling. Try again in a minute. If it persists, email info@duendesdeluruguay.com.

footer_rich.legal_line: Studio in Piriápolis, Uruguay · Legal operation: Duendes del Uruguay LLC (Wyoming, USA)
footer_rich.disclaimer_spiritual: Our Guardians are spiritual, symbolic art. They do not replace medical, psychological, legal, or financial care.
